title: The Ledger Tilts

mood.label: Uneasy calm 🌥️
mood.summary: A quietly strained day where quakes, Ebola, deadly heat and a torn-up trade pact outweighed a soft market and real science wins, without anything breaking wide open.

style.genre: warm downtempo / clavinet-and-vibraphone neo-soul — a sampled Wurlitzer-style electric piano and a sampled clavinet trading a loose, swung comp over a laid-back RhythmAce kit with tape-echo, a sampled vibraphone tracing a circling topline in the gaps, a plucked upright bass walking under a soft sine sub and a low bowed-string pad; Ab mixolydian's lowered seventh keeping the warmth honest and just-off-level — a day that tilts a shade toward strain but refuses to fall

sampleSources: Strudel default library (VCSL, drum machines, sampled keys)
pattern:
stack(
  s("bd ~ ~ rim ~ ~ sd ~, ~ hh ~ hh ~ hh ~ hh").bank("RhythmAce").swingBy(0.14,4).gain(0.62).room(0.18),
  note("<[af2,c3,ef3,gf3] [df3,f3,af3] [ef3,g3,bf3] [f3,af3,c4]>").s("gm_clavinet").attack(0.005).release(0.35).lpf(sine.range(900,2200).slow(12)).gain(0.34).room(0.22).delay(0.2).delaytime(0.28),
  note("<af2 df3 ef3 f2>").s("piano").gain(0.2).lpf(1600).attack(0.01).release(1.2).room(0.3),
  note("af2 af2 ef2 gf2 df2 df2 c2 ef2").s("gm_acoustic_bass").lpf(700).gain(0.5).release(0.4),
  note("c4 ~ ef4 gf4 ~ f4 df4 ~").s("vibraphone").gain(0.4).room(0.4).rsize(4).off(0.1875, x=>x.gain(0.16).pan(0.7)).delay(0.25).delaytime(0.375),
  note("<af1 df2 ef2 f1>").s("sine").lpf(220).gain(0.4).attack(0.4).release(2),
  note("<[af3,c4] [af3,c4,ef4] [bf3,df4] [af3,c4]>").s("gm_string_ensemble_1").attack(1.2).release(3).gain(0.14).lpf(1400).room(0.5)
)

lines: The quarter closed strong and the morning opened thin,
chips sliding red while the Dow just holds its chin.
Somewhere a signature let a treaty quietly lapse —
the last plank of trade left swinging on its straps.
The ledger tilts, it doesn't fall,
a little more strain than relief for us all;
heat on two shores and a count still climbing,
and somewhere a vaccine keeping perfect timing.
Caracas counts the missing, Congo counts the sick,
Cape Town streets go dangerous and quick;
still no girl in her twenties lost to that old disease,
and a green ten-trillion keeps growing through the trees.
